page_metadata.biotools__summary: Merging of mixture components for model-based automated gating of flow cytometry data using the flowClust framework. Users should have a working copy of flowClust 2.0 installed.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Merging of mixture components for model-based automated gating of flow cytometry data using the flowClust framework. Users should have a working copy of flowClust 2.0 installed.
